tweets.text:
One of the coolest parts about getting old is you just start getting bills all the time for all sorts of shit. 

Sometimes you don't even remember what they're for or why they’re so much and you just constantly get them and you have to keep paying them. 

Every month you look at your credit card statement and it's just a huge number and you're like, "Damn, how did that happen?" You just pay that as well and that just continues forever
